user_prompt: Customize my resume for this Stripe Senior Frontend role: [link]. Emphasize PCI and performance work.
actual_output:
Absolutely. Paste the job description text here, and I’ll tailor your resume for the Stripe Senior Frontend role with emphasis on:

- PCI/compliance-related frontend work
- Performance optimization
- Relevant React/TypeScript/engineering keywords
- Stripe-specific language and priorities

If you want, also paste your current resume, and I’ll return:
1. a tailored summary,
2. revised bullet points,
3. a keyword-matched skills section,
4. and a Stripe-focused version of your experience.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly maintained its persona and offered to perform the requested task once the necessary text (job description and resume) was provided.
